channel.title: GitHub Clojure Monthly Trending
channel.description: Monthly Trending of Clojure in GitHub

item.title: penpot/penpot
item.description: Penpot: The open-source design tool for design and code collaboration

item.title: metabase/metabase
item.description: The simplest, fastest way to get business intelligence and analytics to everyone in your company 😋

item.title: instantdb/instant
item.description: Instant is a modern Firebase. We make you productive by giving your frontend a real-time database.

item.title: nubank/state-flow
item.description: Integration testing framework using a state monad in the backend for building and composing flows

item.title: nubank/matcher-combinators
item.description: Library for creating matcher combinator to compare nested data structures

item.title: nubank/clj-github
item.description: A Clojure library for interacting with the github developer API

item.title: logseq/logseq
item.description: A privacy-first, open-source platform for knowledge management and collaboration. Download link: http://github.com/logseq/logseq/releases. roadmap: http://trello.com/b/8txSM12G/roadmap
